parameters.content:
## Recruiting Copilot (standalone)

**Trigger:** `POST /webhook/recruiting-copilot`

**Required:** `candidateName`, `roleDescription`, `cvText`

**Optional:**
- `roleTitle`, `linkedinUrl`
- `recordId` + `writeToAttio` → Attio REST write-back after approval
- `enableAudioSummary: true` → `POST /tts` (SLNG; needs `SLNG_API_KEY` on api/)

**API (packages/core via api/):**
- `POST /webhook/research` — fit + drafts
- `POST /tts` — hosted SLNG audio URL
- `GET /health`

**Start API:** `pnpm api:dev` or `pnpm api:public` (Cloudflare tunnel)

**Env (Docker):** `API_PUBLIC_URL` → `host.docker.internal:3001`, `WEBHOOK_SECRET` from `.env`

Sample: `n8n/sample-payload.json` · Smoke: `pnpm n8n:smoke`

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $('Normalize input').first().json;
const research = $('Run research API').first().json;
const { fit, bundle } = research;

const lines = (items, prefix) =>
  (items ?? []).map((t, i) => `${prefix}${i + 1}. ${t}`).join('\n') || `${prefix}(none)`;

const gaps = (bundle.gapAnalysis ?? [])
  .map((g) => `- **${g.area}** [${g.severity}]: ${g.gap}`)
  .join('\n') || '- (none identified)';

const web = (bundle.webBullets ?? [])
  .map((b) => `- ${b.text}${b.source ? ` (${b.source})` : ''}`)
  .join('\n') || '- (no web enrichment — set ENABLE_TAVILY=true on api/)';

const reviewMarkdown = [
  `# Candidate review: ${input.candidateName}`,
  '',
  `**Fit:** ${fit.score}% — **${fit.tier}** (raw similarity ${fit.rawSimilarity?.toFixed?.(3) ?? fit.rawSimilarity})`,
  '',
  '## Two-liner',
  bundle.twoLiner,
  '',
  '## Pros',
  lines(bundle.fitReasoning?.pros, ''),
  '',
  '## Cons',
  lines(bundle.fitReasoning?.cons, ''),
  '',
  '## Gap analysis',
  gaps,
  '',
  '## HM internal note',
  bundle.hmNote,
  '',
  '## Client submittal draft',
  bundle.clientSubmittalDraft,
  '',
  '## Candidate email draft',
  bundle.candidateEmailDraft,
  '',
  '## Web / LinkedIn bullets',
  web,
].join('\n');

const ttsScript = [
  `${input.candidateName} scores ${fit.score} percent, ${fit.tier} fit.`,
  bundle.twoLiner,
  bundle.fitReasoning?.pros?.length
    ? `Strengths include ${bundle.fitReasoning.pros.slice(0, 2).join(' and ')}.`
    : '',
].filter(Boolean).join(' ');

return [{
  json: {
    candidateName: input.candidateName,
    recordId: input.recordId,
    roleTitle: input.roleTitle,
    linkedinUrl: input.linkedinUrl,
    writeToAttio: input.writeToAttio,
    enableAudioSummary: input.enableAudioSummary,
    fitScore: fit.score,
    fitTier: fit.tier,
    rawSimilarity: fit.rawSimilarity,
    twoLiner: bundle.twoLiner,
    pros: bundle.fitReasoning?.pros ?? [],
    cons: bundle.fitReasoning?.cons ?? [],
    gapAnalysis: bundle.gapAnalysis ?? [],
    hmNote: bundle.hmNote,
    clientSubmittalDraft: bundle.clientSubmittalDraft,
    candidateEmailDraft: bundle.candidateEmailDraft,
    webBullets: bundle.webBullets ?? [],
    reviewMarkdown,
    reviewSummary: `Fit ${fit.score}% (${fit.tier}) — ${bundle.twoLiner}`,
    ttsScript,
    research,
    input,
  },
}];

parameters.content:
## Manual approval gate

Execution pauses here. Open the **form URL** on this node.

- **approve** → optional Attio write-back + optional SLNG audio
- **reject** → nothing written or sent

Review `reviewMarkdown` in the execution panel.

parameters.jsCode:
const review = $('Build full review').first().json;
const decision = $('Wait for approval').first().json;

return [{
  json: {
    status: 'approved',
    mode: 'standalone',
    candidateName: review.candidateName,
    fitScore: review.fitScore,
    fitTier: review.fitTier,
    twoLiner: review.twoLiner,
    pros: review.pros,
    cons: review.cons,
    gapAnalysis: review.gapAnalysis,
    hmNote: review.hmNote,
    clientSubmittalDraft: review.clientSubmittalDraft,
    candidateEmailDraft: review.candidateEmailDraft,
    webBullets: review.webBullets,
    enableAudioSummary: review.enableAudioSummary,
    reviewerNotes: decision['Reviewer notes (optional)'] ?? null,
    message: 'Approved — standalone mode. Copy drafts from this JSON or chain Slack/Email nodes.',
    reviewMarkdown: review.reviewMarkdown,
    reviewSummary: review.reviewSummary,
    ttsScript: review.ttsScript,
    _reviewNode: 'Build full review',
    _baseNode: 'Standalone approved base',
  },
}];

parameters.content:
## SLNG audio (optional)

When `enableAudioSummary: true` in the webhook body:

`POST /tts` → `{ url, downloadUrl, contentType }`

Requires `SLNG_API_KEY` on api/. For public playback URLs use `pnpm api:public`.

parameters.jsCode:
const review = $('Build full review').first().json;
return [{ json: { text: review.ttsScript } }];

const review = $('Build full review').first().json;
return [{ json: { text: review.ttsScript } }];

parameters.content:
## Wire your own outputs

After **Standalone final output** / **Attio final output**:
- **Slack** → `reviewMarkdown`
- **Gmail** → `clientSubmittalDraft`
- **HTTP** → `audioSummary.url`
